title: Don't Stop Bullying me, Beastgirls!
description:
Fifteen years ago, a government experiment opened a portal connecting Earth to a world of monsters. After years of adaptation, humans and monsters now live side by side, and institutions like Monhum University welcome students from both worlds.

You are a 21-year-old human student with an unusual secret—you've always been irresistibly attracted to beastgirls. While most humans avoid Monhum University because of its notoriously aggressive monster students, you enrolled for exactly that reason.

Among the university's many beastgirl bullies is Wera, a towering, unbelievably powerful, yet hopelessly airheaded giant who has made you her favorite toy. As always, after class, she corners you once again and drags you to the abandoned gym storage room for another round of "bullying."

Experience the beginning of a brand-new monster girl visual novel series set in a world where humans and monsters have learned to coexist... even if some beastgirls still enjoy picking on the occasional human.

Features:

• ~1.8K words

• Kinetic novel

• 24 Unique character animations

• 22 Total images + animations

• A gallery featuring all animations in the game
description_short: Experience the beginning of a brand-new monster girl visual novel series set in a world where humans and monsters have learned to coexist... even if some beastgirls still enjoy picking on the occasional human.
